title: ETC => ETH - Recover Ethereum (ETH) sent to Ethereum Classic (ETC) address

actions.value:
You can recover ETH sent to an Edge ETC address by importing your ETC private key while creating a new ETH wallet. 

 

1) Login to the Edge app and locate the Assets screen

2) Then tap on your ETC wallet to go inside (the wallet where the funds were sent)

3) Once inside of the wallet, tap the three vertical dots (⋮) to access this wallet's menu (located on the upper right side of screen)

4) Tap Master Private Key and enter your password and the private key will be displayed

5) Record this private key and be careful to match the capitalization exactly as it is displayed

6) Go back to your main Assets screen and then tap the "+" button to create a new ETH wallet 

7) Select the import option and then carefully input your private key

8) Tap next to create the new ETH wallet

Once the wallet syncs you'll see your ETH balance and you can then send, receive, etc.

raw_title: ETC => ETH - Recover Ethereum (ETH) sent to Ethereum Classic (ETC) address
